global_description: A medium-sized bird with a streamlined body, predominantly grey plumage, and a distinctive black mask across the eyes. It has a slightly hooked beak and long, narrow wings with black and white markings. The tail is long and black with white edges.
discriminative_attributes: Long black tail with white edges

part_details.head: Rounded with a prominent black mask across the eyes, grey crown.
part_details.beak: Short, strong, slightly hooked, dark grey.
part_details.wings: Long, narrow, grey with black and white patterning.
part_details.tail: Long, black with white outer edges, slightly forked.
part_details.body: Streamlined, predominantly grey with lighter underparts.

spatial_relations: The black mask spans across the eyes and extends to the sides of the head.
The wings are positioned laterally along the body, extending outwards.
The tail extends straight from the rear of the body, slightly forked.
